roles.name: normal
roles.description:
Default contributor role. Agent is doing substantive work on the framework
(segment refinement, audit triage, theoretical exploration, doc revision)
and benefits from full context including current architectural state.
roles.notes:
Sees everything. README.md (public) before CLAUDE.md before OUTLINE, then
LEXICON/NOTATION/FORMAT, then PRACTICA + TODO + PROPOSALS for current
state, then segments in OUTLINE order.

roles.name: de-novo-auditor
roles.description:
De-novo audit of the framework. Walks segments in OUTLINE order top-to-bottom
across components, writes between-segment reflections, surfaces findings.
Critically MUST NOT read priming-heavy files until the §7 Phase-2 (integration-
debt triangulation) stage. See doc/de-novo-audit-instructions.md.
roles.notes:
Authoritative source: doc/de-novo-audit-instructions.md §4.1. The exclusion
list is enforced via per-file membership in top-level.yaml; this role-level
exclude_top_level stays empty so the membership tables hold the load.

roles.name: naming-voter
roles.description:
Multi-architecture naming-vote agent. Walks segments in OUTLINE order
casting votes on subject-noun candidates as they emerge from segment
context. Cold-start protocol: must not read other voters' work, brainstorms,
aggregates, or rename-mappings before voting. See doc/naming-principles.md
and doc/naming-cycle-methodology.md.
roles.notes:
Inherits de-novo-auditor exclusion profile via the methodology's "disciplines
transfer verbatim" pointer, plus naming-cycle-specific cold-start exclusions
enforced in top-level.yaml. The naming-principles + naming-cycle-methodology
files are top-level for this role and appear at the top of the orient walk.

extra.notes:

naming voters borrow the rhythm.
